briefdescription.para: This table contains a list of global unique identifiers (GUIDs) that will be issued when exploring the topology using the algorithm in the XDp_TxFindAccessibleDpDevices function.
Operating in TX mode, this function will send a sideband message by creating a data array from the supplied sideband message structure and submitting an AUX write transaction.

detaileddescription.para: In RX mode, the data array will be written as a down reply.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer to the sideband message structure that holds the contents of the data to be submitted.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the write transaction used to transmit the sideband message was successful.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the request timed out.

briefdescription.para: This function will take a byte array and convert it into a sideband message format by filling in the XDp_SidebandMsg structure with the array data.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the data used to fill in the sideband message structure.
is a pointer to the sideband message structure that will be filled in with the transaction data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the transaction data was successfully converted into the sideband message structure format.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the calculated header or body CRC does not match that contained in the transaction data.

briefdescription.para: This function will perform a cyclic redundancy check (CRC) on the header of a sideband message using a generator polynomial of 4.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer sideband message header that the CRC algorithm is to be run on.

simplesect.para: The CRC value obtained by running the algorithm on the sideband message header.
The header is divided into 4-bit nibbles for use by the lower- level XDp_CrcCalculate function.

briefdescription.para: This function will perform a cyclic redundancy check (CRC) on the body of a sideband message using a generator polynomial of 8.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer sideband message body that the CRC algorithm is to be run on.

simplesect.para: The CRC value obtained by running the algorithm on the sideband message body.

briefdescription.para: This function will run a cyclic redundancy check (CRC) algorithm on some data given a generator polynomial.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the data that the algorithm is to run on.
is the total number of data bits that the algorithm is to run on.
is the generator polynomial for the CRC algorithm and will be used as the divisor in the polynomial long division.

simplesect.para: The CRC value obtained by running the algorithm on the data using the specified polynomial.
